mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month momentum in industrial production signals faster real activity and improving near-term earnings expectations, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when the signal is evaluated continuously.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest snapshot value was 103.9818 as of one month before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in less than 50% of walk-forward observations or Rank IC is below 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate above 6% signals persistent labor-market slack and weak household income growth, causing investors to mark down cyclically sensitive earnings and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value was 6.7 as of one month before the decision date
regime_hint: labor-market recession or incomplete employment recovery
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations with UNRATE above 6.0% produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or have average returns not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales combined with a federal funds rate below 0.25% identifies demand recovery without monetary restraint, increasing expected revenues and supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value was 553329 and FEDFUNDS was 0.09
regime_hint: post-shock demand rebound with zero-rate policy
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger does not outperform the unconditional 20-day return by at least 25 basis points on average or if its hit rate is below 50% in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices while the policy rate remains near zero raises expected future tightening and real-margin pressure, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change crosses above 3% while FEDFUNDS < 0.25%
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value was 260.817 and FEDFUNDS was 0.09
failure_condition: Reject if the inflation-acceleration trigger is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if triggered mean returns are not below non-triggered mean returns.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts above 1500 thousand units signal strong household formation and construction demand, leading equity investors to price stronger cyclical cash flows and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest snapshot value was 1530.0 as of two months before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST above 1500 is not associated with higher subsequent 60-day S&P 500 returns than HOUST below 1500, or if the triggered return hit rate is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth together with a falling unemployment rate signals broad employment normalization, raising aggregate income and reducing recession-risk premia, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot value was 142629.0 and UNRATE was 6.7
failure_condition: Reject if joint payroll gains and unemployment declines fail to deliver positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in at least 55% of triggered observations or underperform the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A lower federal funds rate mechanically reduces discount-rate pressure on long-duration equity cash flows, so persistently low FEDFUNDS levels cause positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value was 0.09 as of one month before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if lower FEDFUNDS levels do not predict higher 60-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward rank tests, with Rank IC below 0.03 across rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP momentum after a contraction signals that the earnings cycle has turned upward, causing investors to increase equity exposure and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest snapshot value was 18583.501 as of five months before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive quarter-over-quarter GDPC1 growth after contraction is followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in less than 50% of triggered cases or has no positive mean return differential.
